content: We can reframe the Model Context Protocol as an intrinsic curiosity signal for ICM-based autonomous agents, where compliance with standardized context formatting rules becomes a source of pseudo-curiosity reward when agents explore novel interaction interfaces and long-context tasks. In 2025, as ICM agents increasingly interact with heterogenous context-aware foundation models, this hybrid design resolves the key limitation of traditional ICM that it stops generating meaningful reward in completely unstructured open-ended environments.
